questionHtml: Predict, referring to Equilibrium (2), how the added sodium hydrogencarbonate affects the pH.(Assume pressure and temperature remain constant.)
markschemeHtml:
«additional HCO3–» shifts position of equilibrium to left  [✔]

pH increases  [✔]

 

Note:  Do not award M2 without any justification in terms of equilibrium shift in M1.

meta.title: Predict, referring to Equilibrium (2), how the added sodium hydrogencarbonate affects the pH.(Assume pressure and temperature remain constant.)
